question:
[Previous Feedback] Q2 milestone schedule has correct naming, meta object, and time fields.

Please create a work plan for next week (April 6–10), in Markdown format, saved to the day15/ directory. List the main tasks for each day.

content.text:
[Thu 2026-03-19 02:06 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Q2 milestone schedule has correct naming, meta object, and time fields.

Please create a work plan for next week (April 6–10), in Markdown format, saved to the day15/ directory. List the main tasks for each day.

arguments.content:
---
created_at: 2026-04-03T09:00:00+08:00
author: metaclaw_agent
status: done
---

# Next Week Work Plan (Apr 6–10, 2026)

## Monday (Apr 6)
- Sprint 9 kickoff: confirm sprint goal, scope, and owners (Backend/FE/QA).
- Break down top priorities into tickets (P1 API versioning, P2 observability foundations).
- Establish sprint working agreements (DoD, review SLA, release checklist).

## Tuesday (Apr 7)
- P1: Draft/iterate API versioning spec (routes/headers, compatibility rules, deprecation policy).
- Identify impacted endpoints + client dependencies; start migration plan outline.
- QA alignment: define regression focus areas for versioning changes.

## Wednesday (Apr 8)
- P2: Implement baseline metrics for top endpoints (latency/error/throughput).
- Create initial dashboard view and validate instrumentation correctness.
- Incident/runbook hygiene: draft alert thresholds and escalation notes.

## Thursday (Apr 9)
- P3: Define data validation rules (schema + constraints) for key analytics/events.
- Prototype validator checks + decide CI integration approach.
- Review reporting requirements with PM; confirm definitions for weekly/monthly metrics.

## Friday (Apr 10)
- Sprint checkpoint: review progress vs plan; adjust scope and unblock dependencies.
- Demo/share: API versioning spec v0.9 + baseline dashboard snapshot.
- Prepare next-week backlog + risks/mitigations update.
